note: Tiered curriculum. Loop samples from the current tier each iteration; promotes to the next tier when the current variant hits `promote_threshold` for `promote_stable_iterations` in a row. Dataset frozen — only `current_tier` in eval/state.json mutates as the loop progresses.

easy.description: Trivial procedural parts. Claude should one-shot these with the current skill; if it can't, the skill is broken. Includes all seed_ briefs plus a couple of light NIST envelope-tier parts.

medium.description: NIST and Model Mania envelope tier — render + bbox envelope, no GD&T. Tests shape replication without dimensional rigor.

hard.description: Engineering drawing tier with real GD&T. Agent must read the drawing sheet and reproduce dimensions + tolerances. All NIST drawing briefs plus Model Mania drawing briefs.
